title: Gauge/widget calculations
excerpt:
Description
Please may you consider a widget that enables you to calculate conversion rates from one group to another? 
What are you trying to achieve
We have a board that has a ‘leads’ group and ‘clients’ group however …

posts.author: ThickbroomCIC (Eden Waite)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Please may you consider a widget that enables you to calculate conversion rates from one group to another?

What are you trying to achieve

We have a board that has a ‘leads’ group and ‘clients’ group however I understand that it may be hard to track how many have transitioned. I’d also like the gauge feature to be able to count how many items are in a group as we want to measure how many clients we have.

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think you should be able to do most of this today.

You can count items in a group using a Numbers widget, and for conversion rates a Funnel Chart is usually the better fit since it’s designed to show stage progression like leads to clients.

Quick question, are you using monday CRM? If so, a lot of this is more native with pipeline tracking and conversion views built in.

The only real gap I see is if you specifically want that conversion logic inside a gauge widget instead of using the existing dashboard options.

The Funnel Chart – Support
